meaning: adj.不全神贯注的,不专注的,不集中注意力的
examples: The colour comes from the light that remains unabsorbed.
These and other health changes are attributed to Splenda remaining unabsorbed in the gut.
Any light that emerges will be perceived by an observer as having a color corresponding to the unabsorbed wavelengths.
The unabsorbed fat leads to gas, flatulence, diarrhea, increased bowel movements, and even, how to put this delicately, anal leakage of oily material.
